nasb.text: But your iniquities have made a separation between you and your God, And your sins have hidden His face from you so that He does not hear.

esv.text: but your iniquities have made a separation between you and your God, and your sins have hidden his face from you so that he does not hear.

cnv.text: 而是你們的罪孽使你們與你們的　神隔絕； 你們的罪惡使他掩面不顧你們，不聽你們的禱告。

ccb.text: 你们的罪过使你们与上帝隔绝， 你们的罪恶使祂转脸不看你们， 也不听你们的祈求。

csbs.text: 而是你们的罪孽使你们与你们的神隔绝， 是你们的罪恶使他对你们掩面不听。
